title: Minecraft Security
description: This mod adds some new (unbreakable) blocks. You can use this mod to make your house or building (almost) fully theft-free (except for people with chorus fruit)
body:
a mod that adds some blocks to the game, that improves security



    Password Block

First provide a password, and nobody will be able to pass without the password ever again.

 

    Key Card Maker

Use this to create Key Cards, you need to put a keycard into the slot, and then you can change the data of it. ONLY NUMBERS!!

 

    Key Card

Used to store the codes using Key Card Maker, and open KeyCard readers.

 

    Key Card Reader

To configurate, you only need to right click it with your keycard, (you've made using the Key Card Maker) and then you can only activate the reader using the same card or another card with the same NBT

 

    Reinforced Door

An unbreakable door.

 

    Reinforced Trapdoor

An unbreakable trapdoor

 

    Reinforced Block

An unbreakable block

 

    Block

A block, but breakable

 

    Reinforced Lamp

Just like a redstone lamp, but unbreakable, and with 3 modes: Always on, Always Off, Redstone Mode

 

    Reinforced Glass Block

Unbreakable Glass

 

    Ghost Block

An Unbreakable block, but without collisions

 

    Reinforced Pressure Plate

Unbreakable Pressure Plate
